items.title: Iran using children in security roles in war, reports and witnesses say
items.summary: An 11-year-old is reported to have been killed in an air strike while manning a checkpoint in Tehran.

items.title: Israel says it will keep control over part of southern Lebanon after war with Hezbollah ends
items.summary: Defence Minister Israel Katz also says houses in Lebanese villages near the Israeli border will be demolished.

items.title: Judge temporarily halts construction of Trump's White House ballroom
items.summary: The Republican-appointed judge ruled that Trump was the "steward" of the White House, but not the "owner".

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 尼坦雅胡：以色列將持續粉碎伊朗恐怖政權
items.summary: 以色列總理尼坦雅胡（Benjamin Netanyahu）今天表示，將推進對伊朗的軍事行動，強調會持續「粉碎伊朗恐怖政權」。  法新社報導，尼坦雅胡透過電視轉播發表公開談話，他說：「這次行動...…

items.title: 川普稱戰爭很快將結束　美撤出後海峽將自動開放
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天告訴「紐約郵報」（New York Post），他認為與伊朗的戰爭可能很快將結束，其他國家可在沒有美軍協助下，讓荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）重新開放。  川...…

items.title: 伊朗：擁有必要意志結束戰爭　尋求保證衝突不重演
items.summary: 伊朗總統裴澤斯基安（Masoud Pezeshkian）今天表示，德黑蘭擁有「必要的意志」結束與美國和以色列之間這場戰爭，同時尋求這場衝突不會重演的保障機制。  法新社報導，根據伊朗總統辦公...…
